name: [EXPERIMENTAL] Bad Ending Party RPG | Chapter 1: A New Master
description:
Welcome to Bad Ending Party RPG!
>:3

Welcome back to my All-In-One RPG series!

Hello everyone! (^w^)
I decided to tackle Bad Ending Party this time, hehe~!

INFO

After a successful goblin extermination, Ashe, Rei and Lihan head back to the city. After Lihan and Rei reports the successful mission to the sick king, his son, Alaric, takes interest in the tomboy and decides to take her for himself, while poor Lihan watches in horror. Will you stop him, or will you make things worse?

Just like in all of my all-in-one RPG bots; There are no bad decisions. You are the one writing the story, you have creative freedom! Be the cool hero who saves Rei and Ashe from the clutches of Alaric, or be a villain who makes things worse... Hell! You can even do stupid shit~! You can be anyone/anything, and you can start in any way.

I HOPE YOU HAVE FUN! (^w^)

ORIGINAL DOUJIN

Q&A

What does this RPG bot include? Well, if you're familiar with All-In-One RPG bots, you'll know that this bot includes the original timeline of the doujin, specifically the first chapter,, making it possible for you to start anywhere you'd like! There are also some additional world-building elements, because the original was lacking, lol... (-w-").

Why is this considered Experimental? Because I organized the timeline differently, hoping to get better results + I included a Scene System. I'll greatly appreciate criticism and recommendations on improving it! :D

Will you make other chapters? Yes, I most likely will.

Will you make your scripts public? Can't say for sure, but I'll think about it!

Do you like NTR? Honestly? No, majority of them only exist for the porn scenes. The only NTR I found to be enjoyable didn't even include 18+ scenes. It was about some guy getting reincarnated as the NTR villain, but he wants to avoid the NTR route. Plot twist: He doesn't avoid it, because the original love interest of the girl turns out to be a complete creep (.w.)
